steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage lists works from “five generations”—great-grandfather, grandmother, mother, niece, and González—showing the exhibition covers a range across multiple family generations.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Spans” means to extend across a range, and directly expresses this—the exhibition spans five generations.

The other three either describe actions unsupported by the text (borrowing, judging) or contradict the evidence (neglecting, when these generations are clearly featured).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
